## Fisheries labor

```{r}
#| label: fisheries labor table

# household df
fisheries_labor_hhold_df <- create_df_for_table(
  data_path = params$dir_data,
  analysis_df_name = "fisheries_labor_hhold_df",
  interview_meta_df = supervisor_interviewer_interview
)

tbls50x30::sector_labor(
  hhold_df = fisheries_labor_hhold_df,
  produce_var = monitor50x30:::extract_var_names(params_df$fisheries_labor_produce_var),
  produce_val = monitor50x30:::extract_var_values(params_df$fisheries_labor_produce_val),
  cases = cases_for_report,
  labor_var = monitor50x30:::extract_var_names(params_df$fisheries_labor_labor_var),
  hhold_labor_vals = monitor50x30:::extract_var_values(params_df$fisheries_labor_hhold_labor_vals[[1]]),
  free_labor_val = monitor50x30:::extract_var_values(params_df$fisheries_labor_free_labor_val),
  paid_labor_val = monitor50x30:::extract_var_values(params_df$fisheries_labor_paid_labor_val),
  group_var = "supervisor",
  table_title = "Fishery labor",
  sector_label = "Practice fishing"
)
```
